tasks_completed: implement _hacker_news_top handler in src/services.py (count param, fetches top story IDs then item details, returns JSON with title/url/score/author/comments)
register hacker_news_top in catalog (2 credits, no API key needed)
self-test: verified returns valid JSON with 3 stories
learnings: HN Firebase API is public, no auth, no rate limits — fetches sequentially with urllib, no issues
catalog.register does not accept a tags parameter — fold keywords into description instead
catalog grew to 11 services after this addition
